name: JellyShim
overview: Performance optimization plugin — smaller assets, compressed images, smarter caching.
description: JellyShim optimizes your Jellyfin web client: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native image resizing (AVIF/WebP/JPEG) with per-type settings, intelligent cache headers with ETag/304, HTML optimization (modulepreload, defer, preconnect), Link preload headers, CORS/CORP headers, and optional security headers. Zero external dependency — install, restart, done.

versions.changelog: Fix config page: checkboxes and input fields now show correct default values on first load. Fix config save/load using camelCase keys for Jellyfin 10.11 System.Text.Json API.

AVIF image encoding support (auto-detected via SkiaSharp at runtime), format negotiation now prefers AVIF > WebP > JPEG in auto mode, default format changed to auto, fixed memory leak in image encoder, fixed Content-Type mismatch on runtimes without AVIF support.

Initial release: JS/CSS minification, Brotli/Gzip pre-compression, native ImageSharp image optimization with 13 per-type settings, smart cache headers, HTML optimization, Link preload headers, CORS/CORP, optional security headers, plugin asset support, File Transformation bridge.
